seed_instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain four paragraphs.
instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The response must contain four paragraphs.
response:
The theme for this magical birthday party will be a whimsical jungle adventure where every child feels like a brave explorer. We will transform the living room into a lush rainforest by hanging colorful paper leaves and creating a giant cardboard tree in the corner. Bright green streamers will drape across the ceiling to mimic vines, while animal cutouts will be scattered along the floor for photo opportunities.

To keep the little ones entertained, we will start with a fun "Jungle Animal Charades" game where kids act out their favorite creatures. Afterward, the group will race to find hidden plastic fruits buried in a pile of soft pillows during a lively scavenger hunt. The party will conclude with a gentle bubble chase that allows everyone to run and laugh while trying to pop the floating spheres.

For delicious treats, we will serve tropical fruit skewers arranged on colorful plates to look like little islands in a sea of whipped cream. A large punch bowl filled with bright orange juice and floating fruit slices will be the centerpiece of the snack table. We will also provide mini cupcakes decorated with fondant monkeys and bananas for each guest to enjoy as a sweet finale.

Parents will appreciate the safety measures taken, such as using non-toxic decorations and ensuring all food items are clearly labeled for allergies. The event will last exactly two hours to maintain the high energy levels typical of five-year-olds without causing overtiredness. Finally, we will wrap up the celebration with a group dance party featuring simple moves that everyone can learn together.
